title: ALO — ניתוח עומסים
description: ניתוח עומסים לפי אפליקציה, יעד, פעולה ותבנית, כולל מגמה כוללת.

panels.title: ניצול CPU של Elasticsearch
panels.description: אחוז CPU של תהליך Elasticsearch. דורש את פרופיל ה-prometheus.

panels.title: סך ציוני העומס
panels.description: סך כל ציוני העומס בטווח הזמן שנבחר.

targets.rawSql: SELECT sum(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)

panels.title: מדריך לדשבורד
panels.description: מדריך מהיר לקריאת הדשבורד.

options.content:
‫מדריך מהיר לדשבורד‬

‫איך לקרוא את הדשבורד:‬

‫1. התחילו במבט-על — תרשימי העוגה מראים אילו אפליקציה, יעד, פעולה או תבנית מייצרים את עיקר העומס.‬

‫2. בדקו את טבלת עשר התבניות המובילות — התמקדו בתבניות עם סך העומס הגבוה ביותר ובמחווני העלות הרבים ביותר.‬

‫3. עברו על המגמות — תרשימי העומס לאורך הזמן חושפים קפיצות ודפוסים. השוו אל מול דפלויים או שינויים בתעבורה.‬

‫4. עיינו בנפח ובתפוקה — נפח הבקשות, סך ההתאמות, מסמכים שנכתבו וגודל הבקשה מציגים את העומס התפעולי. סך ההתאמות נמצא במתאם ל-CPU.‬

‫5. בדקו את זמני התגובה — השהיה גבוהה ב-ES או בגייטוויי לצד עומס גבוה עשויה להעיד על הזדמנויות לאופטימיזציה של שאילתות.‬

‫6. בדיקות שפיות — ודאו שהתבניות השכיחות ביותר הן גם הכבדות ביותר; תבניות עם מחווני עלות רבים דורשות תשומת לב.‬

‫על מה להתמקד:‬

‫• פלחים עם עומס גבוה בתרשימי העוגה — לחיצה תסנן את הדשבורד‬

‫• מגמות עולות בסדרות הזמן — עומס גובר או הידרדרות בדפוסים‬

‫• תבניות עם מחווני עלות רבים — מועמדות לאופטימיזציה של שאילתות‬

‫• קפיצות השהיה התואמות לפעולות או לתבניות מסוימות‬

‫סינון לפי תוויות מותאמות:‬

‫אם הבקשות כוללות כותרות x-alo-* (למשל x-alo-team: payments), סננו לפיהן בסרגל Filters שבראש הדשבורד: לחצו +, הקלידו identity.labels.team וקבעו = payments.‬

panels.title: Stress by Application (Selected Period)
panels.description: Stress distribution across applicative providers. Click a slice to filter the dashboard.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(nullIf(toString(identity_applicative_provider), ''), '(unknown)') AS label, sum(stress_score) AS __val FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY label ORDER BY __val DESC LIMIT 8

panels.title: Stress by Target (Selected Period)
panels.description: Stress distribution across target indices. Click a slice to filter the dashboard.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(nullIf(toString(request_target), ''), '(unknown)') AS label, sum(stress_score) AS __val FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY label ORDER BY __val DESC LIMIT 8

panels.title: Stress by Operation (Selected Period)
panels.description: Stress distribution across operation types (search, index, bulk, etc.). Click a slice to filter.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(nullIf(toString(request_operation), ''), '(unknown)') AS label, sum(stress_score) AS __val FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY label ORDER BY __val DESC LIMIT 8

panels.title: Stress by Cost Indicator (Selected Period)
panels.description: התפלגות העומס לפי סוגי מחווני עלות. 'unflagged' = בקשות ללא מחוונים.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(nullIf(toString(arrayJoin(if(empty(stress_cost_indicator_names), ['unflagged'], stress_cost_indicator_names))), ''), '(unknown)') AS label, sum(stress_score) AS __val FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY label ORDER BY __val DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Stress by Template (Selected Period)
panels.description: Stress distribution across request templates. Click a slice to filter the dashboard.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(nullIf(LEFT(toString(request_template), 60), ''), '(no template)') AS label, sum(stress_score) AS __val FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY label ORDER BY __val DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: עשר התבניות המובילות לפי ציון העומס
panels.description: עשר תבניות הבקשה המובילות לפי סך ציוני העומס, כולל אחוזוני השהיה וממוצעי מחווני עלות.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_template AS "Template", sum(stress_score) AS "Sum Stress Score", avg(stress_score) AS "Avg Stress Score", quantile(0.5)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P50 ES Latency (ms)", quantile(0.95)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P95 ES Latency (ms)", quantile(0.99)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P99 ES Latency (ms)", avg(stress_cost_indicator_count) AS "Avg Cost Indicators", count() AS "Requests" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY "Template" ORDER BY "Sum Stress Score" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: עשר הפעולות הכבדות ביותר
panels.description: הבקשות עם ציוני העומס הגבוהים ביותר בטווח הזמן שנבחר. לחיצה על כותרת עמודה ממיינת מחדש.

targets.rawSql: SELECT concat(formatDateTime(timestamp, '%y%m%d%H%i%S'), '-', request_operation, '-', substring(request_path, 1, 20)) AS "Doc ID", formatDateTime(timestamp, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') AS "Time", request_body AS "Request Body", request_operation AS "Operation", request_target AS "Target", request_path AS "Path", stress_score AS "Stress", response_es_took_ms AS "ES Latency (ms)", arrayStringConcat(stress_cost_indicator_names, ', ') AS "Cost Indicators" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) ORDER BY stress_score DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: עשרת מחווני העלות המובילים לפי ציון העומס
panels.description: סוגי מחווני עלות מדורגים לפי תרומת העומס הכוללת, כולל אחוזוני השהיה.

targets.rawSql: SELECT arrayJoin(if(empty(stress_cost_indicator_names), ['unflagged'], stress_cost_indicator_names)) AS "Cost Indicator", sum(stress_score) AS "Sum Stress", avg(stress_score) AS "Avg Stress", quantile(0.5)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P50 ES Latency (ms)", quantile(0.95)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P95 ES Latency (ms)", quantile(0.99)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P99 ES Latency (ms)", count() AS "Requests" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY "Cost Indicator" ORDER BY "Sum Stress" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Stress by Application
panels.description: ציון עומס ממוצע לאורך הזמן, לפי ספק האפליקציה.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, identity_applicative_provider AS series, avg(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND identity_applicative_provider IN (    SELECT identity_applicative_provider FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY identity_applicative_provider ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 5  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Stress by Target
panels.description: Average stress score over time, broken down by target index.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_target AS series, avg(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND request_target IN (    SELECT request_target FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY request_target ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 5  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Stress by Operation
panels.description: ציון עומס ממוצע לאורך הזמן, לפי סוג הפעולה.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_operation AS series, avg(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND request_operation IN (    SELECT request_operation FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY request_operation ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 5  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Stress by Cost Indicator
panels.description: ציון עומס ממוצע לאורך הזמן, לפי מחוון העלות.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, arrayJoin(if(empty(stress_cost_indicator_names), ['unflagged'], stress_cost_indicator_names)) AS series, avg(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND arrayJoin(if(empty(stress_cost_indicator_names), ['unflagged'], stress_cost_indicator_names)) IN (    SELECT arrayJoin(if(empty(stress_cost_indicator_names), ['unflagged'], stress_cost_indicator_names)) FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY arrayJoin(if(empty(stress_cost_indicator_names), ['unflagged'], stress_cost_indicator_names)) ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 5  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Stress by Template
panels.description: ציון עומס ממוצע לאורך הזמן, לפי תבנית הבקשה.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_template AS series, avg(stress_score) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND request_template IN (    SELECT request_template FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY request_template ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 10  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: נפח בקשות
panels.description: סך הבקשות לאורך הזמן. הקו המקווקו הוא נתון גיבוי מאינדקס הסיכום השעתי, לאחר שהנתונים הגולמיים פוגו ב-ILM.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, count() AS "count" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT toStartOfHour(time_bucket) AS t, countMerge(count_state) AS "count_summary" FROM alo.alo_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(time_bucket) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: מסמכים שהוחזרו משאילתות
panels.description: סך המסמכים שהוחזרו משאילתות. במתאם ל-CPU של ES כאשר התור רווי.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, sum(response_hits) AS "sum_response_hits" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: ממוצע מסמכים שהוחזרו לשאילתה
panels.description: ממוצע מסמכים שהוחזרו לשאילתת חיפוש.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(response_hits) AS "avg_response_hits" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: נפח כתיבת Bulk
panels.description: סך המסמכים שנכתבו דרך Bulk — נספרים מגוף הבקשה, מדויק גם עבור בקשות שנקטעו.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, sum(request_bulk_doc_count) AS "sum_request_bulk_doc_count" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: ממוצע מסמכים לפעולת Bulk
panels.description: ממוצע מסמכים לפעולת Bulk — אינדיקציה לגודל ה-batch. נספרים משורות הפעולה בגוף הבקשה.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(request_bulk_doc_count) AS "avg_request_bulk_doc_count" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: גודל בקשות
panels.description: סך גודל הבקשות הנכנסות.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, sum(request_size_bytes) AS "sum_request_size_bytes" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: גודל בקשה ממוצע
panels.description: Average inbound request payload size — rising trend may indicate unbounded search body growth.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(request_size_bytes) AS "avg_request_size_bytes" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: השהיית Elasticsearch
panels.description: מגמת זמן התגובה של Elasticsearch — ממוצע / P50 / P95 / P99. עלייה ב-P95/P99 מסמנת בעיות בקצה ההתפלגות.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(response_es_took_ms) AS "Avg", quantile(0.5)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P50", quantile(0.95)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P95", quantile(0.99)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P99" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: קוד סטטוס לפי פעולה
panels.description: Request counts over time for the top-10 operation/status-code combinations (e.g. search/200, bulk/429).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, concat(request_operation, '/', toString(response_status)) AS series, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND concat(request_operation, '/', toString(response_status)) IN (    SELECT concat(request_operation, '/', toString(response_status)) FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY concat(request_operation, '/', toString(response_status)) ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 10  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

list.name: cluster
list.label: Cluster
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT cluster_name FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT cluster_name FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000

list.name: application
list.label: Application
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT identity_applicative_provider FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT identity_applicative_provider FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000

list.name: target
list.label: Target
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT request_target FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT request_target FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000

list.name: operation
list.label: Operation
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT request_operation FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT request_operation FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000

list.name: username
list.label: Username
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT identity_username FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT identity_username FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500

list.name: cost_indicator
list.label: Cost Indicator
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT arrayJoin(if(empty(stress_cost_indicator_names), ['unflagged'], stress_cost_indicator_names)) FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT arrayJoin(if(empty(stress_cost_indicator_names), ['unflagged'], stress_cost_indicator_names)) FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500

list.name: client_host
list.label: Client Host
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT identity_client_host FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT identity_client_host FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500

list.name: template
list.label: Template
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT request_template FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT request_template FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
